prompt: {"type":"cinematic photo collage","subject":{"character":"teenage Asian schoolgirl musician","outfit":{"top":"black school blazer over a white dress shirt with a loose black tie","bottom":"dark pleated plaid skirt","legwear":"black knee-high socks","shoes":"black loafers"},"hair":{"color":"dark brown to black","style":"long straight hair with bangs, slightly messy from humidity and wind"},"props":["black electric guitar","smartphone visible in selfie shots"],"special_features":["small soft angel wings appearing in some shots","moody introspective expression"]},"setting":{"location":"dense Hong Kong city streets and harborfront","time":"rainy overcast evening","weather":"wet pavement, misty air, light drizzle","background_elements":["narrow urban streets","tall apartment and shop buildings","neon and shop signs with Chinese text","double-decker bus","traffic and headlights","waterfront skyline"]},"style":{"look":"smartphone snapshot realism mixed with cinematic memory-image tone","color":"muted teal, brown, gray, and amber palette with slightly faded colors","lighting":"natural cloudy light, dim urban glow, reflective wet surfaces","camera":"casual handheld phone photography, imperfect framing, slight motion blur, shallow to medium depth of field","mood":"nostalgic, melancholic, urban youth music video interlude"},"layout":{"format":"rounded-corner 12-photo collage in a 3-column by 4-row grid","count":12,"sections":[{"title":"top row","position":"row 1","count":3,"labels":["rainy Hong Kong intersection with tram tracks and tall buildings","girl seen through a train or tram window with reflections and motion blur","mirror selfie of the girl indoors holding phone while wearing guitar and soft angel wings"]},{"title":"second row","position":"row 2","count":3,"labels":["close-up of her legs and loafers on wet street markings","rooftop or elevated city view with her hair at frame edge and hazy skyline","close-up of hands playing black electric guitar"]},{"title":"third row","position":"row 3","count":3,"labels":["girl standing in front of a convenience store or vending refrigerator at night","cafe table with cup and saucer, smartphone, and small metal sugar pot","harbor water and distant skyline with her hair blowing across the frame"]},{"title":"bottom row","position":"row 4","count":3,"labels":["full-body rainy street shot of the girl carrying the guitar with wings faintly visible","portrait behind a rain-streaked window or glass panel with condensation","wet city street with a lone figure and blurred traffic lights receding into the distance"]}],"centerpiece":"the recurring schoolgirl guitarist as if documented over one rainy day in Hong Kong"},"prompt":"Create a 12-image collage that feels like {argument name=\"character name\" default=\"an unnamed schoolgirl guitarist\"} casually photographed these moments on her smartphone while wandering through {argument name=\"city\" default=\"Hong Kong\"}. The collage should look like intimate, accidental snapshots and memory fragments rather than polished commercial photography. Include exactly 12 images in a rounded-corner 3x4 grid, each frame slightly different in composition and distance, showing rainy streets, transit reflections, a mirror selfie with black electric guitar, close-ups of shoes, guitar hands, cafe table details, convenience store glass, harbor skyline, and rain-soaked urban night scenes. The girl wears {argument name=\"outfit style\" default=\"a black school uniform blazer, white shirt, black tie, plaid skirt, knee-high socks, and loafers\"}, with {argument name=\"hair style\" default=\"long dark hair with bangs\"}. Add subtle {argument name=\"fantasy element\" default=\"angel wings\"} in some frames only, blending dreaminess into realism. Emphasize handheld phone imperfection, slight blur, reflections, off-center framing, damp atmosphere, muted cinematic grading, and the feeling of a scene that could be inserted into a music video interlude."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"电影感照片拼贴","subject":{"character":"亚洲青少年女学生音乐人","outfit":{"top":"黑色校服西装外套，内搭白色衬衫，系着松散的黑色领带","bottom":"深色百褶格纹裙","legwear":"黑色及膝袜","shoes":"黑色乐福鞋"},"hair":{"color":"深棕色至黑色","style":"长直发带刘海，因潮湿和风吹略显凌乱"},"props":["黑色电吉他","自拍镜头中可见的智能手机"],"special_features":["部分镜头中出现的小巧柔软天使翅膀","忧郁内省的表情"]},"setting":{"location":"密集的香港城市街道和海滨","time":"阴雨连绵的傍晚","weather":"湿漉漉的地面，雾气弥漫，细雨蒙蒙","background_elements":["狭窄的城市街道","高耸的公寓和商店建筑","带有中文标识的霓虹灯和招牌","双层巴士","车流和车灯","海滨天际线"]},"style":{"look":"智能手机快照写实感与电影记忆影像色调的结合","color":"柔和的青色、棕色、灰色和琥珀色调，色彩略显褪色","lighting":"自然阴天光线，昏暗的城市微光，湿润表面的反光","camera":"随意的手机手持摄影，不完美的构图，轻微的运动模糊，浅至中等景深","mood":"怀旧、忧郁、都市青春音乐视频插曲"},"layout":{"format":"圆角 12 张照片拼贴，采用 3 列 4 行网格布局","count":12,"sections":[{"title":"第一行","position":"row 1","count":3,"labels":["带有电车轨道和高楼的雨中香港十字路口","透过电车或列车窗户看到的女孩，带有倒影和运动模糊","女孩在室内的镜面自拍，背着吉他并佩戴着柔软的天使翅膀"]},{"title":"第二行","position":"row 2","count":3,"labels":["湿润街道标志上她的腿部和乐福鞋特写","天台或高处俯瞰城市视角，她的头发位于画面边缘，背景是朦胧的天际线","弹奏黑色电吉他的手部特写"]},{"title":"第三行","position":"row 3","count":3,"labels":["夜晚站在便利店或自动售货冷柜前的女孩","咖啡桌上的杯碟、智能手机和小型金属糖罐","海港水面与远方天际线，她的头发拂过画面"]},{"title":"第四行","position":"row 4","count":3,"labels":["雨中街道上女孩背着吉他的全身照，隐约可见翅膀","透过布满雨水的窗户或玻璃板拍摄的肖像，带有冷凝水珠","湿润的城市街道，远处有一个孤独的身影和模糊的交通信号灯"]}],"centerpiece":"反复出现的学生吉他手形象，仿佛记录了在香港雨中的一天"},"prompt":"创建一个 12 张图片的拼贴画，感觉就像 {argument name=\"character name\" default=\"一位未具名的学生吉他手\"} 在漫步 {argument name=\"city\" default=\"香港\"} 时用智能手机随意拍摄的瞬间。拼贴画应看起来像亲密的、偶然的快照和记忆碎片，而不是精修的商业摄影。包含 12 张图片，采用圆角 3x4 网格，每帧的构图和距离略有不同，展示雨中街道、交通倒影、带有黑色电吉他的镜面自拍、鞋子特写、弹吉他的手、咖啡桌细节、便利店玻璃、海港天际线和雨水浸润的城市夜景。女孩穿着 {argument name=\"outfit style\" default=\"黑色校服西装外套、白衬衫、黑领带、格纹裙、及膝袜和乐福鞋\"}，留着 {argument name=\"hair style\" default=\"长发带刘海\"}。仅在部分画面中添加微妙的 {argument name=\"fantasy element\" default=\"天使翅膀\"}，将梦幻感融入现实。强调手持手机的不完美感、轻微模糊、反光、偏心构图、潮湿的氛围、柔和的电影级调色，以及那种可以插入音乐视频插曲的场景感。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 雨中香港女学生吉他手拼贴画：一组 12 张电影质感的拼贴照片，描绘了一位在雨中香港漫步的女学生吉他手，专为梦幻般的音乐视频视觉效果或怀旧都市情绪项目而设计。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, full-body, grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, overcast, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
